risk_summary: The August 15, 2021 change in government in Afghanistan has caused the World Bank operational portfolio to be paused pending decisions on future funding, directly halting project implementation activities.
evidence_quote: Currently, the WB operational portfolio is paused until a decision is made about future funding.

risk_summary: Increasing insecurity in rural areas and cities is affecting project implementation capacity and field operations for household support distribution.
evidence_quote: The Government's progress was made despite growing insecurity in the rural areas and cities

risk_summary: Seven months of Parliamentary opposition (October 2020 to April 2021) to the Government's Dastarkhan-e-milli program delayed approval of urban spending budgets for IDLG and Kabul Municipality, impacting project implementation timelines.
evidence_quote: despite approximately seven months of Parliamentary opposition (from October 2020 to April 2021) to the Government's Dastarkhan-e-milli program which delayed the approval of the urban spending budgets for the Independent Directorate of Local Governance (IDLG) and Kabul Municipality
